Path

Hybrid and Multi-cloud Infrastructure

Managed by Google Cloud Partners
3 activities
Last updated 7 months
Start
This learning path prepares you to manage configurations and configuration changes using centralized repositories, leverage Istio to create a service mesh to help run distributed microservices at scale, integrate cloud based and on-prem Kubernetes Engine environments, leverage Kative for serverless Cloud Run applications, and create CI/CD developer pipelines. You will leave ready to help clients create real world hybrid environments.

Youtube Help Center Terms Privacy Manage cookies

Recertify in 3 simple steps:

Link your Google Skills and certification account profiles using the same email to get started.
Instantly see which certifications are eligible for renewal.
Complete courses and skill badges to renew your certifications automatically.

By clicking "Accept", I consent to share my name, email, and course completion data with Google Skills' certification partner, CM Connect, to receive continuing education credit for certification renewal.
